message:
fix(storage): disable autocommit_retain to fix read-after-write stale data, improve test server teardown

Three targeted robustness fixes:

**Disable autocommit_retain (sqlite.rs):**
Set PRAGMA fsqlite.autocommit_retain=0 and PRAGMA autocommit_retain=0
on both namespaces, working around a frankensqlite bug where
same-connection read-after-write queries returned stale data on CASS
storage paths.

**New integration test (sqlite.rs):**
fetch_messages_handles_manual_rows_inserted_via_raw_connection inserts
rows directly via the raw connection and verifies both fetch_messages
and fetch_messages_for_lexical_rebuild return them correctly, confirming
the autocommit fix works end-to-end.

**Test server teardown (model_download.rs):**
Wake connection now calls shutdown(Both) rather than just connecting and
dropping, ensuring the server thread unblocks cleanly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
